message:
feat(fuzz): add iconv/dirent/resolv/pwd_grp fuzz targets (12→16 total)

- fuzz_iconv: 4 ops — open/close, convert, determinism, known codecs
- fuzz_dirent: 3 ops — single parse, exhaustive scan, determinism
- fuzz_resolv: 7 ops — hosts/services parse, lookup, getaddrinfo, getnameinfo
- fuzz_pwd_grp: 8 ops — passwd/group parse, lookup by name/uid/gid, parse_all
- Seed corpus directories with representative inputs for each target
- Registered all 4 new targets in fuzz_nightly.sh (16 targets total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -73,4 +73,24 @@ name = "fuzz_inet"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_inet.rs"
 doc = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_iconv"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_iconv.rs"
+doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_dirent"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_dirent.rs"
+doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_resolv"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_resolv.rs"
+doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_pwd_grp"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_pwd_grp.rs"
+doc = false
+
 [workspace]

@@ -39,6 +39,10 @@ TARGETS=(
     fuzz_time
     fuzz_math
     fuzz_inet
+    fuzz_iconv
+    fuzz_dirent
+    fuzz_resolv
+    fuzz_pwd_grp
 )
 
 # Parse CLI arguments
